job.title: Clinical Reviewer, DPT
job.description: Fully remote role specifically seeking Doctors of Physical Therapy to conduct prior authorization and medical necessity reviews for musculoskeletal and orthopedic programs using evidence-based guidelines — zero direct patient care. Salary $95,000–$105,000; requires 5+ years clinical PT experience and active PT licensure.

job.title: Physical Therapist (PT) – Clinical Reviewer (PRN, Remote U.S.)
job.description: Fully remote PRN 1099-style reviewer role performing prior authorization and medical necessity reviews for Medicaid and government health contracts; no direct patient treatment. Louisiana PT licensure is accepted and the role is open to candidates across the U.S. including Louisiana.

job.title: CQE Manager I – Rehabilitation Services, Physical Therapy (Remote)
job.description: Fully remote, full-time W-2 position ($69,200–$93,000) reviewing medical necessity of physical therapy services for a managed-care specialty health organization; no patient care involved. Requires active PT licensure, 5+ years clinical experience, and strong understanding of PT evidence-based guidelines.

job.title: Medical Advisory Reviewer – Physical Therapist (Louisiana-Licensed, Remote)
job.description: Fully remote, flexible 1099 independent contractor role reviewing medical records and rendering evidence-based clinical opinions for workers' comp, auto/liability, and disability insurance clients — no doctor-patient relationship established. Dane Street actively recruits Louisiana-licensed PTs and manages all administrative intake and records organization.

job.title: Home Health Marketer / Clinical Liaison
job.description: Field-based clinical liaison role for a Shreveport-headquartered home health agency serving northwest Louisiana parishes; focuses on referral development and educating physicians and the medical community — no direct patient treatment. A DPT's clinical credibility and geriatric expertise are a strong differentiator in this relationship-driven territory role.

job.title: Home Health Account Executive
job.company: Christus Home Health / LHC Group (UnitedHealth Group)
job.description: Territory-based account executive role posted March 2026 in Shreveport serving as liaison between referral sources, patients/families, and home health agencies — listed with no required travel outside the local area. A clinical background in PT/geriatrics strongly supports this referral-education and account-management function.

job.title: Clinical Case Manager – Behavioral Health (LA – Shreveport, Alexandria, or Monroe)
job.company: CVS Health / Aetna Better Health of Louisiana
job.description: Remote Medicaid managed-care case management role for Aetna Better Health of Louisiana, explicitly listing Shreveport as one of the accepted candidate locations; involves care coordination, clinical assessment, and provider collaboration rather than direct treatment. A DPT with geriatric specialization brings strong clinical credibility to the physical health case management functions of this role.

job.title: Physical Therapist – Clinical Reviewer (Remote, Louisiana-Licensed)
job.description: Fully remote, 1099 independent contractor role reviewing medical records and providing evidence-based peer review opinions on musculoskeletal and rehabilitative care cases for workers' comp, disability, and insurance clients. Dane Street is actively recruiting Louisiana-licensed PTs for this non-clinical advisory reviewer panel, with no patient treatment involved.

job.title: Physical Therapist or Occupational Therapist Reviewer – PRN (Remote U.S.)
job.description: PRN remote utilization review role where a Louisiana-licensed PT reviews prior authorization requests and determines medical necessity and appropriateness of therapy services for Medicaid and other public-sector contracts. No direct patient care; work is performed from home on a flexible schedule.

job.title: Physical Therapist Reviewer – PRN (Remote, Alabama Medicaid)
job.description: Remote PRN role performing prior authorization and medical necessity reviews for a state Medicaid contract; while the posting specifies an Alabama PT license, Acentra Health routinely opens identical Louisiana-licensed postings and the role is fully work-from-home with no state residency requirement. A strong candidate with a Louisiana license should check the Acentra careers portal for a matching Louisiana posting.

job.title: Home Health Marketer / Clinical Liaison
job.description: Field-based clinical liaison and marketing role at a Shreveport-based home health agency serving northwest Louisiana parishes; responsibilities include physician and facility relationship-building and referral development across the local service area. A DPT with geriatric experience is a strong fit for clinical credibility in this community-facing, non-direct-care role.

job.title: Regulatory Review Specialist (Remote – Home Health & Hospice Compliance)
job.description: Fully remote clinical compliance role supporting medical record audits, payer audit responses, CMS regulatory documentation, and chart review across home health and hospice operations; Louisiana residents are explicitly listed among eligible states. A PT with geriatric and home health documentation experience is well-positioned for this non-clinical quality and compliance function.

job.title: Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Consultant – Remote (Clinical Prior Auth Reviewer)
job.description: Remote role reviewing Medicaid prior authorization requests for durable medical equipment based on medical necessity and state policy guidelines; Gainwell is the Louisiana Medicaid fiscal agent and actively hires Louisiana-based remote clinical reviewers. A geriatric-specialist DPT's expertise in functional capacity and DME appropriateness is highly relevant.

job.title: Medical Advisory Reviewer – Physical Therapist (Remote, 1099 Contractor)
job.description: Independent contractor peer reviewer conducting IME and utilization review cases for workers' compensation, auto liability, and disability payers entirely via remote telework; reviewers choose their own caseload and schedule, and all administrative processes including record organization are handled by Dane Street. This is a non-clinical advisory role with no physician-patient relationship established.

job.title: Clinical Reviewer – PRN (Remote U.S.)
job.description: PRN remote clinical reviewer position using clinical expertise to assess medical appropriateness, communicate determinations, and meet quality and production standards under NCQA and other regulatory frameworks; Acentra has multiple PT-eligible remote reviewer openings across Medicaid and federal contracts. A DPT with 15 years of clinical experience exceeds the qualification threshold for this non-clinical role.

job.title: Clinical Reviewer, DPT (Physical Therapist)
job.description: Cohere Health is actively seeking Doctors of Physical Therapy to conduct non-clinical musculoskeletal and orthopedic prior authorization reviews, applying evidence-based guidelines to determine medical appropriateness — no direct patient care involved. The role requires 5+ years of PT experience and pays $95,000–$105,000 annually with full benefits, making it an excellent match for a senior DPT seeking fully remote non-clinical work.

job.title: Physical Therapist (PT) – Clinical Reviewer – PRN (Remote U.S., Minnesota License)
job.description: Acentra Health is hiring PRN Physical Therapist Reviewers for fully remote utilization review, determining medical appropriateness of therapy services for Medicaid contracts — no patient care required. Louisiana-based PTs should check Acentra's full jobs page for current state-specific openings, as the company actively recruits across the U.S. with multiple PT reviewer postings live simultaneously.

job.title: Medical Advisory Reviewer – Physical Therapist (Remote, 1099)
job.description: Dane Street, a national leader in independent medical examinations and utilization review for workers' comp, auto/liability, and disability clients, actively recruits Louisiana-licensed Physical Therapists as remote 1099 Medical Advisory Reviewers — no patient care, flexible schedule, per-case pay. The candidate should apply directly to Dane Street's recruiter network as the company has active Louisiana-specific reviewer openings and recruits by state licensure.

job.title: Clinical Case Manager – Behavioral Health (LA – Shreveport, Alexandria, or Monroe)
job.company: CVS Health / Aetna Better Health of Louisiana
job.description: This role with Aetna Better Health of Louisiana (ABH-LA) is a field-based clinical case management position rooted in Shreveport, Alexandria, or Monroe, focused on coordinating care for Medicaid members and reducing costs — non-clinical in the direct-treatment sense, with no hands-on patient care. A geriatric-specialist DPT's assessment expertise, knowledge of Medicare/Medicaid, and care coordination background make this a strong transferable fit.
job.date_posted: 2025 (verify current status on CVS careers page)

job.title: Clinical Reviewer – SCA (Remote – RN/LPN)
job.description: While titled for RN/LPN, Acentra Health's SCA Clinical Reviewer program is open to clinical professionals conducting utilization review under federal contracts — PTs are frequently hired in equivalent reviewer tracks at Acentra, and this posting signals active staffing of the department. Candidates should apply directly and note DPT credentials, as Acentra regularly posts PT-specific variants alongside nursing reviewer openings.
